concerns.text: Acceptance Scenario 3 contains unresolved template marker: `logs a `[NEEDS CLARIFICATION: does <dataset> contain <variable>?]` marker`. This is not verifiable as written.

Edge Cases section contains unresolved template marker: `Exclude from analysis and log `[NEEDS CLARIFICATION: does <dataset> contain binary protected attribute?]` for any dataset...`. This is not verifiable as written.
SC-002 references 'documented mathematical formulas' but does not specify where these formulas are documented. Add explicit reference to formula documentation location.

FR-008 'frame all findings as associational, not causal' is vague. Specify how this is verified (e.g., 'documentation must contain disclaimer text' or 'output must include associational language checklist').
